school_address.streetAddress: Survey No.47/9, Janardhan Hills, Opposite NCC Urban Apartments, Sherilingampally Mandal, Gachibowli, Hyderabad, Telangana 500032, India

reviews.author: Shahab
reviews.review_body:
The school boasts of its promising educational system. However, there are several concerning issues that go against its reputation.

Firstly, there is a filthy nala (drain) beside the school that emits a foul odor and attracts mosquitoes, posing significant health hazards for young children and increasing the risk of various illnesses. This is particularly troubling given the vulnerability of children to mosquito-borne diseases. Interestingly, the nala is covered in most areas except for the school vicinity. It is unclear why this section remains uncovered, and the school should work with civic authorities to address this issue.

Furthermore, the school lacks a proper playground. The area shown to parents during visits is actually the school bus parking area, which feels misleading and does not provide a safe, dedicated space for children to play and engage in physical activities.

Additionally, I noticed poor lighting. Despite limited natural light, the lights were not turned on, creating a dim environment that can negatively affect the learning experience. Children certainly won't thrive in such a dark space.

I hope the school will address these important factors of hygiene, proper lighting, and safe play areas soon. These improvements are crucial for providing a conducive learning environment. Should these changes be implemented, I would reconsider my perspective on the school.

reviews.author: siri kris
reviews.review_body: This is a best school my name is lineysha from leg I am in this school now I am 6 th grade

reviews.author: Sheema Kulsoom
reviews.review_body: Prerana Waldorf School holds a special place in my heart. It has been instrumental in my personal growth, providing a strong foundation that has empowered me to achieve great things in life. The school's holistic approach nurtures not only academic excellence but also creativity, critical thinking, and emotional intelligence. The faculty members are truly amazing, dedicated, and passionate about their work. They create a nurturing and supportive environment that encourages students to explore their full potential. I am forever grateful for the invaluable education and life skills I gained from Prerana Waldorf School. It's a place where dreams are nurtured and futures are shaped. #PreranaWaldorfSchool #LifeChangingEducation 🌟

reviews.author: MAUWAZ AHMED
reviews.review_body: My sister, cousins and nieces and nephews had studied in this school and still four of them are attending Prerana. It’s always pleasure to watch them and this school has been playing a wonderful role in grooming them and shaping their personalities. Would recommend this school to parents who are looking for holistic growth of their children.🙏🙏🙏

reviews.author: somi sharma
reviews.review_body: I have been a parent of a child who began her school career at Prerana Waldorf School  as a five year old and now he is in sixth grade. The connection between our natural world, child development and academics is brought into a daily reality. We have been so fortunate to be able to be part of this institution. Our experience with the faculty has been one of mutual respect and willingness to encourage each child to reach their heart's and mind's potential. The curriculum is introduced and taught in a way that connects each child to the outside world in a way that meets them intrinsically. Math, science, language and arts are all part of the daily routine. Ultimately my son is receiving a well rounded  education.

reviews.author: Ananya Devi
reviews.review_body: As a former student of Prerana Waldorf School, I am privileged to share my experience with this institution. Prerana provides an enriching academic environment while fostering creative ideas. I was privileged to be taught by amazing teachers who inspired me and guided me in the right direction. The curriculum is well designed and retains the spirit of waldorf education.

reviews.author: Safa Ali
reviews.review_body:
I attended Prerana Waldorf School from 9th to 12th grade, and my experience there has had a profound impact on my personal growth.

In fact initially, I struggled with stage fright and never imagined being able to deliver speeches. However, the exceptional teachers at Prerana guided and supported me, enabling me to overcome this fear.
Now, in college and at work, I receive compliments on my public speaking abilities.

Overall, Prerana has truly transformed me into a more confident and accomplished individual, and I will always be grateful to my wonderful teachers for their invaluable contribution to my development and for inspiring me to dream big.

reviews.author: prashanthi uppalapati
reviews.review_body: There are so many things we thoroughly love about Prerana Waldorf school including the curriculum, the staff, security, communication, and desire to create a safe and exciting learning environment for the children and staff. My child is excited to go to school each day.

reviews.author: Raj Konakalla
reviews.review_body:
I visited this school twice hoping so much to join my daughter as I like their educational system but had to pull back myself for 2 main reasons. Same feedback was heard from my colleagues as well.

Both the times I visited the school, I checked all classrooms as part of their tour and found despite having less lighting, lights are also not turned on. This might sound insignificant but half of early vision issues in kids happen due to poor lightening in schools and at home, in addition to kids screentime. Vision is clearly at stake looking at their classroom lighting.

Another mail reason is their washrooms. They are NOT at all hygiene and since my daughter wanted to go to washroom, I took her with their permission and found that they are filthy and even water is not coming from washbasin. I am not sure how a school charging lakhs of rupees as academic fee not even able to have hygienic washrooms.

I so wanted to join my daughter for their educational system but couldn't compromise on these 2 important factors.

I heard similar reviews from other parents as well.

I asked them about these but their answer wasn't convincing.

Hope some day they will realize the importance of hygiene environment and kids vision and I wish to join my daughter back in there.

reviews.review_body: I belive it should be good ... hell no with high fees
